## Proposal Submission

- **Organization**: 
- **Year**: 
- **Project Title**: 

## Checklist

- [ ] Folder: `/proposals/{year}/{org-slug}/{project-slug}/` (lowercase, hyphens)
- [ ] Metadata file named `proposal.json` or `proposal.yaml`
- [ ] `project_title` and `short_description` are filled in
- [ ] PDF provided as `proposal.pdf` or via `pdf_url` in metadata
